title: Create-A-Verse
description: Create-a-verse, a modpack that immerses players in a world of exploration and innovation, with a focus on the Create mod. Embark on adventures through new biomes and discover awe-inspiring structures, encounter novel creatures, and unleash your creativity.
body:
## ![The Logo of Create-a-verse](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/z1VeG8Kf/images/4fe7bfeab841cc906acb5f541cd80f98ccb21238.png) ![The Minecraft Overworld with this mod](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/z1VeG8Kf/images/91906a23269454c38ce7f53920ccc0ed5afea042.png)



 | Fabric           |1.19.2    |
 |:--------------------:|:--------------------:|

**Create-a-verse, a modpack that immerses players in a world of exploration and innovation, with a focus on the Create mod. Embark on adventures through new biomes and discover awe-inspiring structures, encounter novel creatures, and unleash your creativity.**
#
### **🚨Alert🚨: If you get crashes, give Minecraft more ram. (recommend 3 - 6 gigs)**
#
## **120+ Mods**
### Main Mods

|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| Angling            | https://modrinth.com/mod/angling    |
